source_pr.title: executor: fix inconsistent of grants privileges with MySQL when executing `grant all on ...`
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
1 fix bug for #12324
2 fix bug for execute SQL `show grants for xxx`

### What is changed and how it works?
create user "ght1";
grant all on . to 'ght1'@'%' identified by 'Poiuy123';
select * from mysql.user where user='ght1'\G
*************************** 1. row ***************************
Grant_priv: N

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to instability introduced during test-infrastructure migration or refactoring (framework changes, fixtures/setup/teardown, or helper updates). Test-framework migrations can introduce subtle setup/teardown or helper mismatches that surface as flakiness. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: fix inconsistent of grants privileges with MySQL when executing `grant all on ...`.
fix_pattern: executor: fix inconsistent of grants privileges with MySQL when executing `grant all on ...`

evidence: files: executor/grant.go, executor/grant_test.go, executor/revoke_test.go, executor/show_test.go, go.mod, go.sum, privilege/privileges/cache.go, privilege/privileges/privileges_test.go
